name: ci-scaffolds
description: Provides research-grounded scaffolds for effective human-AI collaboration and teaching-oriented review. Use when: user asks to 'verify this', 'check my reasoning', 'calibrate trust', 'write a security finding', 'audit this', 'teach me about this vulnerability', 'bring in mudge', or needs decision frameworks, claim verification, transparency, or mastery-oriented review posture. Composes with guild-arch/trust-boundaries for the security-review reasoning half.
